structureChecks.name: EmployeeType is an extensible role
structureChecks.hint: The salary policy should be behind an EmployeeType role so new employee types can be added without rewriting Worker.

structureChecks.name: Regular and Manager implement the employee role
structureChecks.hint: Regular and Manager should be concrete salary policies.

structureChecks.name: Worker delegates salary increases to EmployeeType
structureChecks.hint: Worker should hold and delegate to an EmployeeType instead of branching on concrete employee classes.

structureChecks.name: Variable behaviors are interfaces
structureChecks.hint: Strategy needs interchangeable behavior contracts, not hard-coded algorithms.

structureChecks.name: The context composes behavior strategies
structureChecks.hint: The context should delegate variable behavior to replaceable behavior objects.

structureChecks.name: DoubleQuack is a new quack strategy
structureChecks.hint: Practice 2-2 asks for a new QuackBehavior implementation that prints Quack, Quack.

structureChecks.name: Egg behavior is a third strategy family
structureChecks.hint: Practice 2-3 adds EggBehavior plus SpawnEgg and SpawnNothing concrete strategies.

structureChecks.name: Duck supports egg behavior at runtime
structureChecks.hint: Duck should own, perform, and replace the EggBehavior strategy like fly and quack behavior.

structureChecks.name: ModelDuck can copy another duck's behavior
structureChecks.hint: Practice 2-4 asks ModelDuck.CopyBehavior(Duck source) to copy fly, quack, and egg behavior.

structureChecks.name: WeatherDataSubject uses java.util.Observable
structureChecks.hint: Practice 3 specifically asks for the java.util.Observable / Observer API.

structureChecks.name: Weather stores are java.util observers
structureChecks.hint: UmbrellaStore, ClothingStore, and IceCreamStore should subscribe through the same Observer contract.

structureChecks.name: IceCreamStore handles the warm-weather extension
structureChecks.hint: Practice 3 adds IceCreamStore, which sells ice cream when temperature is at least 20 degrees.

structureChecks.name: State interface defines state-dependent actions
structureChecks.hint: State should move condition-heavy behavior behind a shared action contract.

structureChecks.name: Day and night states implement State
structureChecks.hint: Each concrete state owns its own transition and action behavior.

structureChecks.name: UrgentState adds the alarm state
structureChecks.hint: Practice 4 adds UrgentState with security-center messages that ignore the current time.

structureChecks.name: Alarm transitions into UrgentState
structureChecks.hint: Pressing Alarm should move the context into UrgentState before urgent actions are handled.

structureChecks.name: Menus use Java Iterator
structureChecks.hint: Practice 5-1 moves the menu contract to the Java standard Iterator.

structureChecks.name: DinerMenu uses the alternating iterator
structureChecks.hint: Practice 5-1 asks DinerMenu.createIterator() to return AlternatingDinerMenuIterator.

structureChecks.name: PancakeHouseMenu delegates to ArrayList iterator
structureChecks.hint: Practice 5-1 asks PancakeHouseMenu to use the ArrayList-provided iterator.

structureChecks.name: CafeMenu is Hashtable-backed
structureChecks.hint: Practice 5-2 adds CafeMenu using Hashtable values as the iterator source.

structureChecks.name: Waitress prints the cafe menu too
structureChecks.hint: The client should handle breakfast, lunch, and cafe menus through the same Iterator abstraction.

structureChecks.name: Mediator contract coordinates colleagues
structureChecks.hint: Mediator centralizes UI coordination rules.

structureChecks.name: Colleague contract depends on mediator
structureChecks.hint: Colleagues should expose enable/disable behavior without controlling peers directly.

structureChecks.name: UI colleagues implement Colleague
structureChecks.hint: Every widget that participates in coordination should speak the Colleague contract.

structureChecks.name: A coordinator implements Mediator
structureChecks.hint: The frame owns the coordination rules instead of scattering them across widgets.

structureChecks.name: Login requires username and password length at least four
structureChecks.hint: Practice 6 changes the login rule from one or more characters to username and password each being at least four characters.

structureChecks.name: MazeGameCreator exposes factory methods
structureChecks.hint: Factory Method keeps the maze-building algorithm stable while subclasses choose products.

structureChecks.name: A concrete creator overrides product family
structureChecks.hint: A concrete creator should return a consistent product family.

structureChecks.name: Snow creator completes the factory-method exercise
structureChecks.hint: The variant creator skeleton should inherit MazeGameCreator and return concrete products instead of null.

structureChecks.name: Abstract factory client uses factory object
structureChecks.hint: Abstract Factory passes one product-family factory into the maze-building algorithm.

structureChecks.name: Snow abstract factory completes the exercise
structureChecks.hint: The variant factory skeleton should inherit MazeFactory and return concrete products instead of null.

structureChecks.name: Abstract factory main enables the Snow argument
structureChecks.hint: Practice 7-1 asks the client main path to accept the Snow argument.

structureChecks.name: Factory method main enables the Snow argument
structureChecks.hint: Practice 7-2 asks the client main path to accept the Snow argument.

structureChecks.name: Prototype main selects default, Harry, and Snow prototypes
structureChecks.hint: Practice 7-3 extends the prototype factory main path for Harry and Snow themes.

behaviorTests.name: factory-product-family
expectedOutputContains: PASS factory snow families and prototype

structureChecks.name: Decorator base keeps the component type
structureChecks.hint: Decorators must be substitutable wherever a Beverage is expected.

structureChecks.name: Concrete decorators wrap another component
structureChecks.hint: Each condiment should hold the beverage it decorates and add to its behavior.

structureChecks.name: Concrete decorators share a decorator base
structureChecks.hint: Concrete decorators should share the decorator base type.

structureChecks.name: LowerCaseInputStream decorates FilterInputStream
structureChecks.hint: Java IO decorators should wrap an InputStream through FilterInputStream.

structureChecks.name: Both read methods are overridden
structureChecks.hint: The decorator should preserve the InputStream contract for both single-byte and bulk reads.

structureChecks.name: ShiftInputStream decorates FilterInputStream
structureChecks.hint: Practice 8-2 adds ShiftInputStream(InputStream, int) and ShiftInputStream(InputStream).

structureChecks.name: ShiftInputStream implements alphabet wrapping
structureChecks.hint: The shift filter should wrap A-Z and a-z while leaving numbers and symbols unchanged.

structureChecks.name: Entry is the shared component
structureChecks.hint: Composite starts with one component type for both leaf and composite nodes.

structureChecks.name: Leaf and composite share a component base
structureChecks.hint: Clients should treat files and directories uniformly through Entry.

structureChecks.name: Composite stores child entries
structureChecks.hint: A composite node should own child entries and aggregate their behavior recursively.

structureChecks.name: Entries expose full paths
structureChecks.hint: Practice 9 asks getFullName() to walk parent links from the current entry to the root.

structureChecks.name: Visitor overloads each element type
structureChecks.hint: Visitor uses overloaded visit methods to separate operations from element classes.

structureChecks.name: Elements accept visitors
structureChecks.hint: Each element should call back into the visitor using accept.

structureChecks.name: Destroy visitor is added
structureChecks.hint: Practice 11-1 adds CarElementDestroyVisitor that prints Destroying xxx messages.

structureChecks.name: Trunk element is added to the car structure
structureChecks.hint: Practice 11-2 adds a Trunk element and the corresponding visitor overload.

structureChecks.name: Element accepts Visitor
structureChecks.hint: Element is the stable hook that allows new operations to be added as visitors.

structureChecks.name: Visitor overloads concrete element types
structureChecks.hint: Double dispatch relies on visitor overloads for each concrete element.

structureChecks.name: Concrete elements dispatch to visitor
structureChecks.hint: Concrete elements should delegate operations to the visitor, not perform every operation themselves.

structureChecks.name: ListVisitor traverses directory children
structureChecks.hint: A visitor can carry traversal state while walking a composite structure.

structureChecks.name: FileFindVisitor finds matching extensions
structureChecks.hint: Practice 11-3 adds a visitor that collects files matching the requested extension.
